session.objective: Fix BIM viewer URL not updating after file upload and stream selection
session.user_reported_issue: the url never changes to show a stream or project login

root_cause_identified.issue: Called setSelectedStream directly instead of handleStreamSelect

after.behavior: Calls handleStreamSelect which updates BOTH state AND URL

additional_fixes_from_previous_session.fix: Added try/catch error handling in getProjectStreams()
additional_fixes_from_previous_session.problem: If ANY stream failed to load, ENTIRE request failed
additional_fixes_from_previous_session.solution: Skip failed streams, log error, continue with others
additional_fixes_from_previous_session.impact: Prevents complete viewer failure when individual streams have issues

additional_fixes_from_previous_session.fix: Updated to use real OAuth on staging instead of mocks
additional_fixes_from_previous_session.impact: E2E tests now validate actual staging behavior with authentication

additional_fixes_from_previous_session.problem: stream.stream_id could be undefined, creating literal 'undefined' in URL
additional_fixes_from_previous_session.solution: Only set URL param if stream_id is valid, otherwise clear params

commits_this_session.message: fix(bim-viewer): Fix URL not updating after IFC file upload

immediate: Monitor deployment workflow: gh run watch 20938174503
Wait for staging deployment to complete

steps: 4. Upload an IFC file in the Upload tab

api_without_auth.behavior: Returns 500 Internal Server Error when called without auth token
api_without_auth.note: This is expected backend behavior - requires authentication

staging_database.projects: User must have existing projects with proper roles
staging_database.streams: Streams created on-demand via Initialize or Upload

related_commits_from_previous_sessions.message: fix(bim-viewer): Add error handling to getProjectStreams
fix(api-gateway): Add comprehensive error logging for elements endpoint
feat(bim-viewer): Add URL parameter support for direct stream linking
